query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM special_cases WHERE titleEs IS NOT NULL AND titleEs != title) as cases_translated,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM special_cases) as cases_total,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM documents WHERE titleEs IS NOT NULL AND titleEs != title) as docs_translated,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM documents) as docs_total;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user qC6e8XA9uYDpdWY.4aab5d30693d --database DirVLPm6UeFJi3utFGbgZe --execute 
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM special_cases WHERE titleEs IS NOT NULL AND titleEs != title) as cases_translated,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM special_cases) as cases_total,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM documents WHERE titleEs IS NOT NULL AND titleEs != title) as docs_translated,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM documents) as docs_total;
